series_metadata.series_description: Those documents incorporated by reference by the Director''s Final Findings and Orders which authorized the variance from classification as a waste (See to Rule 3745-50-23 of the Admininistrative Code) or exemption from the hazardous waste requirements (See 3734.02(G) of the Revised Code).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: request is denied or final variance or exemption has expired, is withdrawn or terminated. expiration, withdrawal or termination
